entries.title: Household continuity failure across generations
research_risk: Made the world look harder than it really was
Made gen1->gen2 failure look like a pure ecology problem
Could falsely suggest viable body designs did not exist
before_fix_behavior: Adult children often failed reproduction due to nest food access problems
Family household storage resolution was unstable across generations
fix_summary: Updated household nest resolution for parent/shared-home continuity
after_fix_behavior: Sexed-world runs could reach gen3 without lowering world difficulty
current_interpretation: Pre-fix sexed extinction runs are partly contaminated by a household continuity bug

entries.title: Research tick telemetry gap
research_risk: Blocked direct per-tick collapse analysis for research-only runs
Made some inheritance bundles look complete when timeline data was empty
before_fix_behavior: Research-only runs could export empty tick_metrics.csv
tick_summaries were captured only when capture_dashboard was enabled
detection_evidence: Empty tick_metrics.csv in inheritance research bundles despite valid manifests
fix_summary: Capture per-tick telemetry whenever capture_dashboard or capture_research_data is enabled
after_fix_behavior: Repaired inheritance runs now include full per-tick collapse profiles
current_interpretation: Old research bundles with empty tick metrics are incomplete for demographic-timing analysis

entries.title: Projected-energy storage ordering bug
research_risk: Could misattribute low nest storage to ecology alone
Masked the true personal-vs-household energy tradeoff
before_fix_behavior: Storage checks ran against pre-meal energy rather than projected post-meal energy
Agents could fail to store food on the same tick they had just become able to do so
detection_evidence: Direct code inspection of call order in agent.py
fix_summary: Store-surplus logic now uses projected_energy = self.energy + restored_energy
after_fix_behavior: Founder-250 A/B comparison worsened after the fix
current_interpretation: The bug was real but had been masking a harsher model imbalance
The simulation currently over-penalizes the balance between personal energy and household storage after storage is made more correct

ruled_out_hypotheses.title: Missing sex assignment in gen1
reason_ruled_out: Telemetry confirmed gen1 males and females existed
The failure was in reproduction gates, not sex inheritance
